SubLayerProcessing.SQLScript:
select  
 GeneratedGoldenClaimsUniqueKey  
,GeneratedMedicalClaimsUniqueKey  
,ClientID  
,FileLayoutID  
,FileLayoutDescription  
,ClaimNumber  
,OriginalClaimNumber  
,BeneficiaryID   
,PlanMemberID  
,CMSContractNumber  
,BillTypeCode  
,ClaimTypeInd  
,ClaimStatus  
,ClaimProcessDate  
,ClaimFormType  
,DetailServiceDate  
,ClaimEntryDate  
,ClaimReceivedDate  
,ClaimTotalChargeAmount  
,ClaimAllowedAmount  
,CheckDate  
,ClaimFinalizedDate  
,CoinsuranceAmt  
,DeductibleAmt  
,CopayAmt  
,ServiceFacilityID 
,ServiceFacilityNPI 
,RenderingProviderID 
,RenderingProviderNPI  
,RenderingProviderTIN  
,RenderingProviderSpecialtyCode  
,BillingProviderID  
,BillingProviderTIN  
,BillingProviderTaxonomy  
,AttendingProviderNPI  
,PlaceOfService  
,StatementFromDate  
,StatementToDate  
,ICD  
,ICDCodeType  
,isPrimaryCode  
,isAdmitcode
,IsRiskAdjustable
,UniquePersonKey
,hash(concat(  
IfNull(GeneratedGoldenClaimsUniqueKey,""),"|",  
IfNull(GeneratedMedicalClaimsUniqueKey,""),"|",  
IfNull(ClientID,""),"|",  
IfNull(FileLayoutID,""),"|",  
IfNull(FileLayoutDescription,""),"|",  
IfNull(ClaimNumber,""),"|",  
IfNull(OriginalClaimNumber,""),"|",  
IfNull(BeneficiaryID,""),"|",  
IfNull(PlanMemberID,""),"|",  
IfNull(CMSContractNumber,""),"|",  
IfNull(BillTypeCode,""),"|",  
IfNull(ClaimTypeInd,""),"|",  
IfNull(ClaimStatus,""),"|",  
IfNull(ClaimProcessDate,""),"|",  
IfNull(ClaimFormType,""),"|",  
IfNull(DetailServiceDate,""),"|",  
IfNull(ClaimEntryDate,""),"|",  
IfNull(ClaimReceivedDate,""),"|",  
IfNull(ClaimTotalChargeAmount,""),"|",  
IfNull(ClaimAllowedAmount,""),"|",  
IfNull(CheckDate,""),"|",  
IfNull(ClaimFinalizedDate,""),"|",  
IfNull(CoinsuranceAmt,""),"|",  
IfNull(DeductibleAmt,""),"|",  
IfNull(CopayAmt,""),"|",  
IfNull(ServiceFacilityID,""),"|",  
IfNull(ServiceFacilityNPI,""),"|",  
IfNull(RenderingProviderID,""),"|",  
IfNull(RenderingProviderNPI,""),"|",  
IfNull(RenderingProviderTIN,""),"|",  
IfNull(RenderingProviderSpecialtyCode,""),"|",  
IfNull(BillingProviderID,""),"|",  
IfNull(BillingProviderTIN,""),"|",  
IfNull(BillingProviderTaxonomy,""),"|",  
IfNull(AttendingProviderNPI,""),"|",  
IfNull(PlaceOfService,""),"|",  
IfNull(StatementFromDate,""),"|",  
IfNull(StatementToDate,""),"|",  
IfNull(ICD,""),"|",  
IfNull(ICDCodeType,""),"|",  
IfNull(isPrimaryCode,""),"|",
IfNull(isAdmitcode,""),"|",  
IfNull(IsRiskAdjustable,""),"|",
IfNull(UniquePersonKey,"")
 )) as hashKey  
from  
(  
select src.*, row_number() over(partition by GeneratedMedicalClaimsUniqueKey, ICD, isPrimaryCode, isAdmitcode order by GeneratedGoldenClaimsUniqueKey desc) as rownum  
from (  
select * from (  
select  
 gc.GeneratedGoldenClaimsUniqueKey  
,gc.GeneratedMedicalClaimsUniqueKey  
,gc.ClientID  
,gc.FileLayoutID  
,gc.FileLayoutDescription  
,gc.ClaimNumber  
,gc.OriginalClaimNumber  
,gc.BeneficiaryID  
,gc.PlanMemberID  
,gc.CMSContractNumber  
,gc.BillTypeCode  
,gc.ClaimTypeInd  
,gc.ClaimStatus  
,gc.ClaimProcessDate
,gc.IsRiskAdjustable  
,mc.ClaimFormType  
,mc.DetailServiceDate  
,mc.ClaimEntryDate  
,mc.ClaimReceivedDate  
,mc.ClaimTotalChargeAmount  
,mc.ClaimAllowedAmount  
,mc.CheckDate  
,mc.ClaimFinalizedDate  
,mc.CoinsuranceAmt  
,mc.DeductibleAmt  
,mc.CopayAmt  
,mc.ServiceFacilityNPI  
,mc.RenderingProviderNPI  
,mc.RenderingProviderTIN  
,mc.RenderingProviderSpecialtyCode  
,mc.BillingProviderID  
,mc.BillingProviderTIN  
,mc.BillingProviderTaxonomy  
,mc.AttendingProviderNPI  
,mc.PlaceOfService  
-- Update StatementFromDate & StatementToDate for professional claims 
,case when mc.ClaimtypeInd in ("1","2") then mc.StatementFromDate
when mc.ClaimtypeInd = "3" then cd.Min_ServiceFromDate
end as StatementFromDate
,case when mc.ClaimtypeInd in ("1","2") then mc.StatementToDate
when mc.ClaimtypeInd = "3" then IfNull(cd.Max_ServiceToDate, cd.Max_ServiceFromDate)
end as StatementToDate  
,case   
 when sqnc.id=0 then mc.AdmitDiagCode when sqnc.id=1 then mc.PrimaryDiagCode when sqnc.id=2 then mc.DiagCode2   
 when sqnc.id=3 then mc.DiagCode3 when sqnc.id=4 then mc.DiagCode4 when sqnc.id=5 then mc.DiagCode5  
 when sqnc.id=6 then mc.DiagCode6 when sqnc.id=7 then mc.DiagCode7 when sqnc.id=8 then mc.DiagCode8  
 when sqnc.id=9 then mc.DiagCode9 when sqnc.id=10 then mc.DiagCode10 when sqnc.id=11 then mc.DiagCode11  
 when sqnc.id=12 then mc.DiagCode12 when sqnc.id=13 then mc.DiagCode13 when sqnc.id=14 then mc.DiagCode14  
 when sqnc.id=15 then mc.DiagCode15 when sqnc.id=16 then mc.DiagCode16 when sqnc.id=17 then mc.DiagCode17  
 when sqnc.id=18 then mc.DiagCode18 when sqnc.id=19 then mc.DiagCode19 when sqnc.id=20 then mc.DiagCode20  
 when sqnc.id=21 then mc.DiagCode21 when sqnc.id=22 then mc.DiagCode22 when sqnc.id=23 then mc.DiagCode23  
 when sqnc.id=24 then mc.DiagCode24 when sqnc.id=25 then mc.DiagCode25 when sqnc.id=26 then mc.DiagCode26  
 when sqnc.id=27 then mc.DiagCode27 when sqnc.id=28 then mc.DiagCode28 when sqnc.id=29 then mc.DiagCode29  
 when sqnc.id=30 then mc.DiagCode30 when sqnc.id=31 then mc.DiagCode31 when sqnc.id=32 then mc.DiagCode32  
 when sqnc.id=33 then mc.DiagCode33 when sqnc.id=34 then mc.DiagCode34 when sqnc.id=35 then mc.DiagCode35  
 when sqnc.id=36 then mc.DiagCode36 when sqnc.id=37 then mc.DiagCode37 when sqnc.id=38 then mc.DiagCode38  
 end as ICD  
,mc.ICDVersion as ICDCodeType  
,case when sqnc.id=1 then 1 end as isPrimaryCode  
,case when sqnc.id=0 then 1 end as isAdmitcode 
,mc.RenderingProviderID 
,mc.ServiceFacilityID
,gc.UniquePersonKey
from GoldenClaim gc  
 left join MedicalClaim mc on gc.GeneratedMedicalClaimsUniqueKey = mc.GeneratedMedicalClaimsUniqueKey
 --join another tbl
 join (select ClaimNumber, min(ServiceFromDate) as Min_ServiceFromDate, max(ServiceFromDate) as Max_ServiceFromDate, max(ServiceToDate) as Max_ServiceToDate from MedicalGoldenClaimLineProcedureCodes
group by ClaimNumber) as cd
on mc.ClaimNumber = cd.ClaimNumber 
 cross join   
 ( select 0 as id union all select 1 as id union all select 2 as id union all select 3 as id union all   
   select 4 as id union all select 5 as id union all select 6 as id union all select 7 as id union all  
   select 8 as id union all select 9 as id union all select 10 as id union all select 11 as id union all  
   select 12 as id union all select 13 as id union all select 14 as id union all select 15 as id union all  
   select 16 as id union all select 17 as id union all select 18 as id union all select 19 as id union all   
   select 20 as id union all select 21 as id union all select 22 as id union all select 23 as id union all  
   select 24 as id union all select 25 as id union all select 26 as id union all select 27 as id union all  
   select 28 as id union all select 29 as id union all select 30 as id union all select 31 as id union all  
   select 32 as id union all select 33 as id union all select 34 as id union all select 35 as id union all   
   select 36 as id union all select 37 as id union all select 38 as id  
 )sqnc  
 )src1 
 where coalesce(trim(ICD),"")<>""
 )src)fnl where rownum=1
SubLayerProcessing.MergeScript:
MERGE INTO DestinationTable t 
  USING 
  ( 
  SELECT 
   ss.GeneratedGoldenClaimsUniqueKey 
  ,ifnull(ss.GeneratedMedicalClaimsUniqueKey,dt.GeneratedMedicalClaimsUniqueKey) as GeneratedMedicalClaimsUniqueKey 
  ,ss.ClientID 
  ,ss.FileLayoutID 
  ,ss.FileLayoutDescription 
  ,ss.ClaimNumber 
  ,ss.OriginalClaimNumber 
  ,ss.BeneficiaryID 
  ,ss.PlanMemberID 
  ,ss.CMSContractNumber 
  ,ss.BillTypeCode 
  ,ss.ClaimTypeInd 
  ,ss.ClaimStatus 
  ,ss.ClaimProcessDate 
  ,ss.ClaimFormType 
  ,ss.DetailServiceDate 
  ,ss.ClaimEntryDate 
  ,ss.ClaimReceivedDate 
  ,ss.ClaimTotalChargeAmount 
  ,ss.ClaimAllowedAmount 
  ,ss.CheckDate 
  ,ss.ClaimFinalizedDate 
  ,ss.CoinsuranceAmt 
  ,ss.DeductibleAmt 
  ,ss.CopayAmt 
  ,ss.ServiceFacilityID
  ,ss.ServiceFacilityNPI 
  ,ss.RenderingProviderID
  ,ss.RenderingProviderNPI 
  ,ss.RenderingProviderTIN 
  ,ss.RenderingProviderSpecialtyCode 
  ,ss.BillingProviderID 
  ,ss.BillingProviderTIN 
  ,ss.BillingProviderTaxonomy 
  ,ss.AttendingProviderNPI 
  ,ss.PlaceOfService 
  ,ss.StatementFromDate 
  ,ss.StatementToDate 
  ,ifnull(ss.ICD,dt.ICD) as ICD 
  ,ss.ICDCodeType 
  ,ifnull(ss.isPrimaryCode,dt.isPrimaryCode) as isPrimaryCode 
  ,ifnull(ss.isAdmitcode,dt.isAdmitcode) as isAdmitcode 
  ,ss.IsRiskAdjustable
  ,ss.hashKey
  ,ss.UniquePersonKey
  FROM tempSQLScript ss 
  FULL OUTER JOIN DestinationTable dt 
  on  ss.GeneratedMedicalClaimsUniqueKey = dt.GeneratedMedicalClaimsUniqueKey 
  and ss.ICD = dt.ICD 
  and ifnull(ss.isPrimaryCode,0) = ifnull(dt.isPrimaryCode,0) 
  and ifnull(ss.isAdmitcode,0) = ifnull(dt.isAdmitcode,0) )s 
  ON s.GeneratedMedicalClaimsUniqueKey = t.GeneratedMedicalClaimsUniqueKey AND s.ICD = t.ICD 
  AND ifnull(s.isPrimaryCode,0) = ifnull(t.isPrimaryCode,0) 
  AND ifnull(s.isAdmitcode,0) = ifnull(t.isAdmitcode,0) 
  WHEN MATCHED AND s.hashKey is null THEN DELETE 
   WHEN MATCHED AND s.hashKey is not null AND s.hashKey <> t.hashKey THEN UPDATE SET 
     GeneratedGoldenClaimsUniqueKey = s.GeneratedGoldenClaimsUniqueKey 
    ,GeneratedMedicalClaimsUniqueKey = s.GeneratedMedicalClaimsUniqueKey 
    ,ClientID = s.ClientID 
    ,FileLayoutID = s.FileLayoutID 
    ,FileLayoutDescription = s.FileLayoutDescription 
    ,ClaimNumber = s.ClaimNumber 
    ,OriginalClaimNumber = s.OriginalClaimNumber 
    ,BeneficiaryID = s.BeneficiaryID 
    ,PlanMemberID = s.PlanMemberID 
    ,CMSContractNumber = s.CMSContractNumber 
    ,BillTypeCode = s.BillTypeCode 
    ,ClaimTypeInd = s.ClaimTypeInd 
    ,ClaimStatus = s.ClaimStatus 
    ,ClaimProcessDate = s.ClaimProcessDate 
    ,ClaimFormType = s.ClaimFormType 
    ,DetailServiceDate = s.DetailServiceDate 
    ,ClaimEntryDate = s.ClaimEntryDate 
    ,ClaimReceivedDate = s.ClaimReceivedDate 
    ,ClaimTotalChargeAmount = s.ClaimTotalChargeAmount 
    ,ClaimAllowedAmount = s.ClaimAllowedAmount 
    ,CheckDate = s.CheckDate 
    ,ClaimFinalizedDate = s.ClaimFinalizedDate 
    ,CoinsuranceAmt = s.CoinsuranceAmt 
    ,DeductibleAmt = s.DeductibleAmt 
    ,CopayAmt = s.CopayAmt 
    ,ServiceFacilityID = s.ServiceFacilityID
    ,ServiceFacilityNPI = s.ServiceFacilityNPI 
    ,RenderingProviderID = s.RenderingProviderID
    ,RenderingProviderNPI = s.RenderingProviderNPI 
    ,RenderingProviderTIN = s.RenderingProviderTIN 
    ,RenderingProviderSpecialtyCode = s.RenderingProviderSpecialtyCode 
    ,BillingProviderID = s.BillingProviderID 
    ,BillingProviderTIN = s.BillingProviderTIN 
    ,BillingProviderTaxonomy = s.BillingProviderTaxonomy 
    ,AttendingProviderNPI = s.AttendingProviderNPI 
    ,PlaceOfService = s.PlaceOfService 
    ,StatementFromDate = s.StatementFromDate 
    ,StatementToDate = s.StatementToDate 
    ,ICD = s.ICD 
    ,ICDCodeType = s.ICDCodeType 
    ,isPrimaryCode = s.isPrimaryCode 
    ,isAdmitcode = s.isAdmitcode 
	,IsRiskAdjustable = s.IsRiskAdjustable
    ,hashKey = s.hashKey
    ,UniquePersonKey=s.UniquePersonKey 
   
  WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT 
   ( 
     GeneratedGoldenClaimsUniqueKey 
    ,GeneratedMedicalClaimsUniqueKey 
    ,ClientID 
    ,FileLayoutID 
    ,FileLayoutDescription 
    ,ClaimNumber 
    ,OriginalClaimNumber 
    ,BeneficiaryID 
    ,PlanMemberID 
    ,CMSContractNumber 
    ,BillTypeCode 
    ,ClaimTypeInd 
    ,ClaimStatus 
    ,ClaimProcessDate 
    ,ClaimFormType 
    ,DetailServiceDate 
    ,ClaimEntryDate 
    ,ClaimReceivedDate 
    ,ClaimTotalChargeAmount 
    ,ClaimAllowedAmount 
    ,CheckDate 
    ,ClaimFinalizedDate 
    ,CoinsuranceAmt 
    ,DeductibleAmt 
    ,CopayAmt 
    ,ServiceFacilityID
    ,ServiceFacilityNPI 
    ,RenderingProviderID
    ,RenderingProviderNPI 
    ,RenderingProviderTIN 
    ,RenderingProviderSpecialtyCode 
    ,BillingProviderID 
    ,BillingProviderTIN 
    ,BillingProviderTaxonomy 
    ,AttendingProviderNPI 
    ,PlaceOfService 
    ,StatementFromDate 
    ,StatementToDate 
    ,ICD 
    ,ICDCodeType 
    ,isPrimaryCode 
    ,isAdmitcode
	,IsRiskAdjustable
    ,hashKey
    ,UniquePersonKey
  ) 
  VALUES 
  ( 
     s.GeneratedGoldenClaimsUniqueKey 
    ,s.GeneratedMedicalClaimsUniqueKey 
    ,s.ClientID 
    ,s.FileLayoutID 
    ,s.FileLayoutDescription 
    ,s.ClaimNumber 
    ,s.OriginalClaimNumber 
    ,s.BeneficiaryID 
    ,s.PlanMemberID 
    ,s.CMSContractNumber 
    ,s.BillTypeCode 
    ,s.ClaimTypeInd 
    ,s.ClaimStatus 
    ,s.ClaimProcessDate 
    ,s.ClaimFormType 
    ,s.DetailServiceDate 
    ,s.ClaimEntryDate 
    ,s.ClaimReceivedDate 
    ,s.ClaimTotalChargeAmount 
    ,s.ClaimAllowedAmount 
    ,s.CheckDate 
    ,s.ClaimFinalizedDate 
    ,s.CoinsuranceAmt 
    ,s.DeductibleAmt 
    ,s.CopayAmt 
    ,s.ServiceFacilityID
    ,s.ServiceFacilityNPI 
    ,s.RenderingProviderID
    ,s.RenderingProviderNPI 
    ,s.RenderingProviderTIN 
    ,s.RenderingProviderSpecialtyCode 
    ,s.BillingProviderID 
    ,s.BillingProviderTIN 
    ,s.BillingProviderTaxonomy 
    ,s.AttendingProviderNPI 
    ,s.PlaceOfService 
    ,s.StatementFromDate 
    ,s.StatementToDate 
    ,s.ICD 
    ,s.ICDCodeType 
    ,s.isPrimaryCode 
    ,s.isAdmitcode
	,s.IsRiskAdjustable
    ,s.hashKey
    ,s.UniquePersonKey
  )
